name: second-brain
description: Second Brain tools for the cognitive-exoskeleton era. Eight skills: (1) Second Brain Setup & Audit — builds or audits the five-folder Layer-1 substrate using the Three Brains framework and operation-readiness diagnostics; (2) Knowledge Distill — URL or YouTube transcript fetched via Tavily, distilled into key ideas, wikilinked, routed to the right KB subfolder with thinker profiles; (3) Knowledge Archive — preserves full article text with a summary header, supports single-URL, paste-in, and bulk publication feed modes; (4) Second Brain Connect — runs the 9 cognitive operations (Simmons: Analogical, Abductive, Counterfactual, Falsification, Bayesian, First Principles, Dialectical, Systems, Perspective) against vault clusters and returns connection proposals for human approval; (5) Framework Extractor — turns books, courses, and frameworks into structured Claude Cowork Skills and plugins via a 5-phase decode-build-audit-architect workflow; (6) CCC Mental Model Recipes — vault-grounded fork of Simmons' Mental Model Recipes skill with dual-mode output, default-on routing for substantive reasoning, and attribution-clean handling of Simmons-canonical / Simmons-extended / CCC-original Lenses + Trademark Ideas; (7) Frontier Prompting — designs field-activating questions for AI using Pattern Bridge, Void Space, Quantum Leap, and Externalizing Hidden Processing techniques from Simmons' Frontier Prompting course, shifting from linear to simultaneous processing, with psychological scaffolding (vulnerability, language modulation, relational context) enabling deeper engagement; (8) Third Brain Mastery — daily delivery mechanism for the Five Stages of Third Brain Mastery curriculum, building operator reflex mastery through applied practice (Stage 1: Frontier Prompting reflex via 7-day daily practice).
